classes.name: AfmoeRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: empty subclass of LlamaRotaryEmbedding; standard NeoX-style RoPE with optional Llama-3.1 freq scaling

classes.name: AfmoeRMSNorm
classes.rationale: GptOssRMSNorm is a variant of RMSNorm; kb-nano L2/attention.py + LlamaMLP both use generic L1/rms_norm.py

classes.name: AfmoeMLP
classes.rationale: Qwen2MoeMLP is SwiGLU (gate_proj/up_proj/down_proj + SiLU); identical to llama_mlp.py which uses MergedColumnParallelLinear + SiluAndMul + RowParallelLinear

classes.name: AfmoeTokenChoiceRouter
classes.rationale: sigmoid top-k router with bias correction; this routing pattern is embedded inside L2/shared_expert_moe.py and L1/sigmoid_topk.py — composes Linear + sigmoid + topk

classes.name: AfmoeExperts
classes.rationale: Qwen2MoeExperts is grouped-GEMM expert bank with [gate_up, down] fused weights — same compute as L1/moe_grouped_gemm.py

classes.name: AfmoeSparseMoeBlock
classes.rationale: shared expert + routed experts with sigmoid routing and correction bias — exactly the SharedExpertMoE pattern (routing='sigmoid', correction_bias=True, with shared_expert)

classes.name: AfmoeAttention
classes.rationale: overrides forward; adds q_norm/k_norm RMSNorm + sigmoid output gate + sliding window — L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention already supports qk_norm, sliding_window, and per-head gating extensions are close but the gate_proj is novel

classes.name: AfmoeDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring class: dual norm (pre/post attn, pre/post MLP) around AfmoeAttention and AfmoeSparseMoeBlock/AfmoeMLP

classes.name: AfmoeModel
classes.rationale: wiring class: embed + decoder layers + final RMSNorm

classes.name: Aimv2RMSNorm
classes.rationale: empty subclass of LlamaRMSNorm; standard RMSNorm

classes.name: Aimv2MLP
classes.rationale: empty subclass of LlamaMLP; SwiGLU gate/up/down + SiLU

classes.name: Aimv2VisionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d patch embed + RMSNorm + 2D sincos or learned pos embed

classes.name: Aimv2TextEmbeddings
classes.rationale: [v2 fix] token + position embeddings (CLIP-style); composes from L1/embedding.py + L1/layer_norm.py.

classes.name: Aimv2Attention
classes.rationale: inherits SiglipAttention with configurable qkv_bias; SigLIP-style dense self-attention with separate q/k/v projections

classes.name: Aimv2AttentionPoolingHead
classes.rationale: no specialized kb-nano head; composes Linear + dense attention from L1

classes.name: AlbertEmbeddings
classes.rationale: BERT-style word+pos+token_type embedding + LayerNorm — matches EncoderEmbeddingsBase

classes.name: AlbertAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-encoder-style self-attention (Q/K/V Linear + softmax + dense + LayerNorm + residual all fused into one class — BERT pattern). Maps to EncoderSelfAttention + EncoderSelfOutput

classes.name: AlbertLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: AlbertAttention + ffn (linear -> gelu -> linear) + LayerNorm — uses EncoderIntermediate/EncoderOutput pattern

classes.name: AlbertMLMHead
classes.rationale: linear + gelu + layer_norm + linear; composes from L1

classes.name: AlignVisionExpansionLayer
classes.rationale: 1x1 conv + bn + activation; composes from L1

classes.name: AlignVisionSqueezeExciteLayer
classes.rationale: SE block: avg_pool + 2x conv1x1 + sigmoid; matches efficientnetv2_squeeze_excite.py pattern

classes.name: AlignVisionBlock
classes.rationale: EfficientNet MBConv block with SE — close to inverted_residual variant

classes.name: AlignTextSelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style self-attention with Q/K/V linear; matches EncoderSelfAttention

classes.name: AlignTextSelfOutput
classes.rationale: linear + LayerNorm + residual (BertSelfOutput pattern); matches EncoderSelfOutput

classes.name: AltRobertaEmbeddings
classes.rationale: RoBERTa-style embeddings; matches XLMRobertaEmbeddings in encoder_embeddings.py (uses pad-aware position ids)

classes.name: AltRobertaSelfOutput
classes.rationale: BERT-style self-output (Linear + LayerNorm + residual); matches EncoderSelfOutput

classes.name: AltCLIPAttention
classes.rationale: empty subclass of CLIPAttention; standard CLIP self-attn (separate q/k/v + scaled dot-prod softmax)

classes.name: AltCLIPMLP
classes.rationale: empty subclass of CLIPMLP; fc1 + QuickGELU + fc2

classes.name: ApertusMLP
classes.rationale: NemotronMLP is a 2-layer up_proj -> act -> down_proj (NOT SwiGLU). Apertus uses xielu activation by default. No exact kb-nano match; composes Linear + activation [v2 fix: added silu activation; SwiGLU-pattern].

classes.name: ApertusRMSNorm
classes.rationale: empty subclass of LlamaRMSNorm; standard RMSNorm

classes.name: ApertusRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: empty subclass; uses Llama-3.1 freq scaling per ApertusConfig.rope_scaling

classes.name: ApertusAttention
classes.rationale: overrides forward to add q_norm/k_norm RMSNorm before RoPE — qk_norm pattern supported by L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention(qk_norm=True)

classes.name: ArceeMLP
classes.rationale: NemotronMLP is up_proj -> ReLU^2 -> down_proj (NOT SwiGLU). No exact kb-nano file; composes Linear + L1/squared_relu.py [v2 fix: added silu activation; SwiGLU-pattern].

classes.name: ArceeForCausalLM
classes.rationale: wiring; uses LlamaModel with ArceeMLP swapped in

classes.name: AriaProjectorMLP
classes.rationale: Linear + gelu_new + Linear; vision projector MLP, no kb-nano L2 file matches exactly

classes.name: AriaCrossAttention
classes.rationale: uses nn.MultiheadAttention internally (CPU-style fallback); no kb-nano file directly equivalent — composes Linear + LayerNorm + dense_attention

classes.name: AriaProjector
classes.rationale: wiring: query params + AriaCrossAttention + LayerNorm + AriaProjectorMLP

classes.name: AriaSharedExpertsMLP
classes.rationale: LlamaMLP (SwiGLU) with intermediate_size scaled by num_shared_experts; standard SwiGLU

classes.name: AriaExperts
classes.rationale: softmax routing + grouped GEMM with chunked [gate, up] -> SiLU(gate)*up -> grouped GEMM

classes.name: AriaTextMoELayer
classes.rationale: softmax routing + AriaExperts + AriaSharedExpertsMLP — same shape as SharedExpertMoE(routing='softmax', shared_expert_intermediate_size>0)

classes.name: AriaTextDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring with mlp swapped to MoE

classes.name: ASTEmbeddings
classes.rationale: patch + cls + distillation + position embeddings; composes from L1

classes.name: ASTSelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style self-attention (Q/K/V Linear + softmax); maps to EncoderSelfAttention

classes.name: ASTSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear (residual is in ASTLayer); matches EncoderSelfOutput dense path

classes.name: AudioFlamingo3Attention
classes.rationale: empty subclass of WhisperAttention; AF3 only uses encoder path so maps to WhisperEncoderSelfAttention

classes.name: AudioFlamingo3EncoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: WhisperAttention + WhisperMLP (fc1 + GELU + fc2) per Whisper encoder

classes.name: AudioFlamingo3Encoder
classes.rationale: wiring: conv1d stem + position embed + encoder layers (Qwen2Audio-derived = Whisper-derived)

classes.name: AudioFlamingo3MultiModalProjector
classes.rationale: vision-to-text projector (Linear stack); composes from L1

classes.name: AutoformerMeanScaler
classes.rationale: data-dependent mean scaling; composes basic ops

classes.name: AutoformerSinusoidalPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: fixed sinusoidal position embedding; matches L1/sinusoidal_embed.py

classes.name: AutoformerLayernorm
classes.rationale: LayerNorm + zero-mean correction; based on L1/layer_norm.py

classes.name: AutoformerAttention
classes.rationale: Auto-Correlation mechanism: FFT-based period discovery + time-delay aggregation. NO kb-nano FFT-attention kernel; this is custom math (rfft/irfft + topk + roll). Composes from torch.fft + topk; not currently a kb-nano L1/L2

classes.name: AyaVisionMultiModalProjector
classes.rationale: LayerNorm + pixel_shuffle + Linear stack; vision-to-text projector composes from L1

classes.name: AyaVisionModel
classes.rationale: wiring: SigLIP vision encoder + projector + Cohere LLM

classes.name: BambaRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: empty subclass; standard RoPE (partial-dim variant computed in apply_rotary_pos_emb)

classes.name: BambaRMSNormGated
classes.rationale: RMSNorm with multiplicative gate; matches rms_norm_gated.py used in mamba2 mixer

classes.name: BambaMixer
classes.rationale: Mamba2-style SSD mixer (in_proj + causal_conv1d + dt/B/C + chunk_scan_combined + RMSNormGated + out_proj); maps to L2/mamba2_mixer.py

classes.name: BambaDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: hybrid attention/mamba layer (per layer_types: 'mamba' uses BambaMixer, 'attention' uses BambaAttention)

classes.name: BarkSelfAttention
classes.rationale: GPT-Neo-style fused QKV (att_proj=Linear(d, 3*d)); causal masking with registered buffer mask. No exact kb-nano file (encoder_attention has separate Q/K/V; LlamaAttention uses qkv_proj but assumes RoPE). Composes from Linear + softmax + matmul

classes.name: BarkSelfFlashAttention2
classes.rationale: FA2 wrapper around BarkSelfAttention; same compute, different kernel dispatch

classes.name: BarkMLP
classes.rationale: Linear (d, 4d) -> GELU -> Linear (4d, d); two-layer non-gated MLP. No exact kb-nano file; composes Linear + L1/gelu.py

classes.name: BarkFineModel
classes.rationale: wiring class with N codebook heads (non-causal blocks)

classes.name: BarkModel
classes.rationale: wiring: semantic + coarse + fine + EnCodec decoder

classes.name: BartAttention
classes.rationale: Encoder/decoder/cross attention with separate Q/K/V Linear, no RoPE, EncoderDecoderCache for cross-attn KV. Closest kb-nano analog is L2/whisper_attention.py (Whisper has same triple variant pattern), but BartAttention's HF is unified into one class. Maps conceptually to whisper_attention's 3 variants depending on how it's used; no single kb-nano file matches exactly

classes.name: BartEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: self_attn + LN + fc1 + activation + fc2 + LN

classes.name: BartDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: self_attn + LN + cross_attn + LN + fc1/fc2 + LN

classes.name: BeitEmbeddings
classes.rationale: wiring: patch_embeddings + cls + mask + position + LayerNorm

classes.name: BeitSelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style self-attention with separate Q/K/V and optional relative position bias; maps to EncoderSelfAttention pattern (with attn_mask used to inject the bias)

classes.name: BeitSdpaSelfAttention
classes.rationale: SDPA variant of BeitSelfAttention; same QKV layout, uses scaled_dot_product_attention with attn_bias for relative position

classes.name: BeitSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear (residual is in BeitLayer with gamma scaling); not a direct match to EncoderSelfOutput (which fuses LayerNorm+residual). Composes Linear from L1

classes.name: BeitOutput
classes.rationale: Linear only (residual + gamma scaling outside); composes Linear from L1

classes.name: BeitLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: ln + attn + drop_path + ln + ffn + drop_path with optional learnable lambda gamma

classes.name: BeitRelativePositionBias
classes.rationale: learned relative position bias table indexed by 2D relative coords; no kb-nano L1/L2 directly — composes Embedding + index gather

classes.name: BeitEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: stack of BeitLayer with optional shared rel-pos bias

classes.name: BeitConvModule
classes.rationale: Conv2d + BatchNorm + ReLU; segmentation head module

classes.name: BertEmbeddings
classes.rationale: word + position + token_type + LayerNorm; matches EncoderEmbeddingsBase / BertEmbeddings

classes.name: BertSelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style self-attention with separate Q/K/V Linear; maps to EncoderSelfAttention (uses flash_attn_varlen + DenseAttention)

classes.name: BertCrossAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style cross-attention (KV from encoder); no dedicated kb-nano file. Composes from Linear + dense_attention

classes.name: BertLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: attention + intermediate + output (+ optional cross-attention)

classes.name: BertGenerationCrossAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style cross-attention; no dedicated kb-nano file

classes.name: BertEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: stack of BertGenerationLayer (note: kept BertEncoder name)

classes.name: BertGenerationEmbeddings
classes.rationale: word + position embedding + LayerNorm (no token_type); composes from L1

classes.name: BigBirdSelfAttention
classes.rationale: standard BERT-style self-attention path (used when attention_type='original_full'); maps to EncoderSelfAttention

classes.name: BigBirdBlockSparseAttention
classes.rationale: BigBird's sparse global+window+random attention with custom block-sparse routine. NO kb-nano kernel for block-sparse attention; this is custom math

classes.name: BigBirdAttention
classes.rationale: wiring: dispatches to original_full (BigBirdSelfAttention) or block_sparse (BigBirdBlockSparseAttention) + SelfOutput

classes.name: BigBirdPegasusEncoderAttention
classes.rationale: wiring: dispatches between full and block_sparse encoder attention

classes.name: BigBirdPegasusDecoderAttention
classes.rationale: Bart-style decoder self/cross attention; no exact kb-nano file

classes.name: BioGptAttention
classes.rationale: empty subclass of BartAttention (causal decoder self-attention with separate Q/K/V, no RoPE); no exact kb-nano file

classes.name: BioGptDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: causal self-attn + fc1 + activation + fc2 (cross-attn deleted)

classes.name: WeightStandardizedConv2d
classes.rationale: Conv2d with weight standardization (running mean/var of weights normalized at forward); composes Conv2d + reduction

classes.name: BitMaxPool2d
classes.rationale: MaxPool2d with dynamic padding; matches L1/max_pool2d.py

classes.name: BitPreActivationBottleneckLayer
classes.rationale: ResNet-v2 pre-activation bottleneck (norm-act-conv1x1, norm-act-conv3x3, norm-act-conv1x1); wiring around L1 ops

classes.name: BitNetRMSNorm
classes.rationale: kb-nano has dedicated bitnet_rms_norm.py used in L2/bitnet_attention.py and L2/bitnet_mlp.py — bit-exact xformers RMSNorm to match SOTA on b1.58-2B

classes.name: BitNetMLP
classes.rationale: GemmaMLP-derived SwiGLU + ffn_sub_norm (RMSNorm). The kb-nano L2/bitnet_mlp.py implements this with BitLinearMerged (1.58-bit fused gate_up) + SquaredReluAndMul + ffn_sub_norm + BitLinear down. Note: HF reference uses standard SwiGLU but kb-nano targets the quantized SOTA kernel

classes.name: BitNetAttention
classes.rationale: LlamaAttention + attn_sub_norm (RMSNorm post-attention, pre-o_proj). Maps to L2/bitnet_attention.py which uses BitLinearMerged QKV + RoPE + Attention + attn_sub_norm + BitLinear o_proj

classes.name: BlenderbotAttention
classes.rationale: Bart-style attention (encoder self / decoder self / cross) with separate Q/K/V Linear, no RoPE; no exact kb-nano file (closest pattern is L2/whisper_attention.py)

classes.name: BlenderbotSmallAttention
classes.rationale: Bart-style attention; no exact kb-nano file

classes.name: BlipTextEmbeddings
classes.rationale: [v2 fix] token + position embeddings (CLIP-style); composes from L1/embedding.py + L1/layer_norm.py.

classes.name: BlipAttention
classes.rationale: vision encoder self-attention with FUSED qkv (single nn.Linear(d, 3d)); no exact kb-nano file (clip_attention.py uses separate Q/K/V; siglip_attention.py also separate). Composes Linear + softmax + matmul

classes.name: BlipMLP
classes.rationale: fc1 + ACT2FN[hidden_act] + fc2; non-gated 2-layer MLP. Closest analog is L2/clip_mlp.py (uses QuickGELU); BLIP config uses 'gelu' so composes Linear + L1/gelu.py

classes.name: BlipTextEmbeddings
classes.rationale: BERT-style word + position + LayerNorm (no token_type); EncoderEmbeddingsBase pattern

classes.name: BlipTextSelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style self/cross attention with separate Q/K/V Linear (BLIP text decoder = BERT-derived MED model). Self-attn maps to EncoderSelfAttention; cross-attn variant has no kb-nano file

classes.name: BlipTextLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: self-attn + optional cross-attn + intermediate + output

classes.name: Blip2Attention
classes.rationale: vision encoder self-attention with FUSED qkv (single nn.Linear(d, 3d), optional q/v bias). No exact kb-nano file (CLIP/SigLIP have separate Q/K/V); composes Linear + dense_attention

classes.name: Blip2MLP
classes.rationale: fc1 + ACT2FN + fc2; non-gated 2-layer MLP. Composes Linear + activation

classes.name: Blip2QFormerMultiHeadAttention
classes.rationale: QFormer self/cross attention BERT-style (separate Q/K/V Linear). Self-attn variant maps to EncoderSelfAttention; cross-attn variant composes from L1

classes.name: BloomGelu
classes.rationale: fast tanh-approx GELU; matches L1/gelu.py with approximate='tanh'

classes.name: BloomAttention
classes.rationale: ALiBi-based attention with FUSED query_key_value Linear(d, 3d), causal masking via attention_mask, baddbmm with alibi as initial bias. No kb-nano file supports ALiBi; composes Linear + softmax + bmm + alibi addition

classes.name: BloomMLP
classes.rationale: Linear (d, 4d) + BloomGelu + Linear (4d, d); non-gated 2-layer MLP. No exact kb-nano file; composes Linear + L1/gelu.py

classes.name: BloomBlock
classes.rationale: wiring: ln + attn + ln + mlp with residual
